scripts.build: npm run build --workspace wasmatrix && npm run build --workspace @wasmatrix/gl && npm run build --workspace @wasmatrix/gpu
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage --workspace wasmatrix && npm run test --workspace @wasmatrix/gl && npm run test --workspace @wasmatrix/gpu
scripts.coverage:codecov: npm run coverage:codecov --workspace wasmatrix && npm run test --workspace @wasmatrix/gl && npm run test --workspace @wasmatrix/gpu
scripts.docs:build: npm --prefix wasmatrix/docs ci && npm run docs:build --workspace wasmatrix
scripts.fmt: npm run fmt --workspace wasmatrix && npm run fmt --workspace @wasmatrix/gl && npm run fmt --workspace @wasmatrix/gpu
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace wasmatrix && npm run lint --workspace @wasmatrix/gl && npm run lint --workspace @wasmatrix/gpu
scripts.pages:build: npm --prefix wasmatrix/docs ci && npm run pages:build --workspace wasmatrix && node wasmatrix/scripts/sync-pages-build.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace wasmatrix && npm run test --workspace @wasmatrix/gl && npm run test --workspace @wasmatrix/gpu
